title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: Better Stack reviews CopilotKit, a framework enabling generative UI and agent-native app development. The video explains how CopilotKit addresses limitations of bolted-on AI chatbots by allowing agents to render real UI components, share state with React/Next.js apps, and implement human-in-the-loop workflows, comparing it against Vercel AI SDK and custom implementations.
writeup: Better Stack reviews CopilotKit, a framework for generative UI and agent-native app development. The video explains how CopilotKit moves past bolted-on AI chatbots by letting agents render real UI components, share state with React and Next.js apps, and run human-in-the-loop workflows. It compares the approach against the Vercel AI SDK and custom implementations.
